title: Wooden Cake Topper | Rustic Baby Shower Decoration | Gender Neutral Cake Topper | Natural Wood Finish | Perfect for Gender Reveal, Birthday Parties | Reusable Decor
features: Charming Rustic Design: This wooden baby shower cake topper adds a touch of rustic elegance to your baby shower cake, making it a perfect decoration for any baby celebration.
Premium Natural Wood: Crafted from high-quality natural wood, this cake topper features a smooth, polished finish, making it a durable and reusable keepsake.
Gender Neutral Decor: The natural wood color and classic design make it suitable for both baby boy and baby girl showers, as well as gender reveal parties.
Easy to Use and Reuse: Simply insert the topper into the cake for an instant decorative touch. After the event, clean and store it for future celebrations.
Perfect for Multiple Occasions: Ideal for baby showers, gender reveal parties, first birthdays, and other special occasions, adding a delightful and personalized touch.
description: Product description Celebrate your special moments with this charming Wooden Baby Shower Cake Topper, designed to add a rustic, elegant touch to your baby shower cake. Crafted from high-quality natural wood, this topper features a smooth and polished finish, making it a perfect keepsake that you can reuse for future celebrations. Its gender-neutral design makes it suitable for both baby boys and girls, as well as for gender reveal parties. Easy to use, simply insert it into your cake for an instant decorative effect. After the event, clean and store it safely for your next celebration. Whether for a baby shower, first birthday, or other special occasion, this cake topper adds a warm and personalized touch to your cake display. Safety Warning no
